# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.3] - 2023-07-31

### Bug Fixes

- [**breaking**] Rename `DATA_DIR_OXITRAFFIC` to `OXITRAFFIC_DATA_DIR` to be consistent with other env vars

### Features

- Exclude more files from the published crate
- Improve publishing routine in the justfile
- [**breaking**] Remove the /dashboard nesting
- Show more stats
- Improve base template
- Make the tab title clearer by removing "OxiTraffic | "
- Update deps
